title: Washing Machine Classifier Calibration Expected Outputs
description: Schema for tests/washing-machine/calibration-expected.json -- the machine-readable contract of the classifier's expected outputs across the 25-row calibration corpus. Validated via `jsonschema` in Commit 0b's checkpoint gate.

rows.description: Exactly 25 rows keyed row_001..row_025. No more, no less. Drift is a bug.

input.description: The exact user message fed to the classifier.

oneOf.description: keep=true rows must specify category and shelf (entities are not required since some keep=true rows defer entity extraction to the pending-confirmation flow -- see row 016)
keep=false rows must specify discard_reason and must NOT carry category/shelf/entities

keep.description: True = extract entities + write to shelf. False = discard.

shelf.description: Target shelf. Ship 1 MVP uses 'semantic' only; other shelves are stubs until Ship 3.

discard_reason.description: Only present when keep=false. Structured reason, NOT free-form.

entities.description: Extracted entities. Empty array or absent when keep=false.

timestamp_iso.description: ISO 8601 timestamp resolved from relative dates in the input, anchored to message-arrival time.

date_confidence.description: 0.7 is the pending-confirm threshold: below 0.7, classifier should flag needs_confirmation_reason.

needs_confirmation_reason.description: Structured reasons for pending-confirmation flow. Empty array means no confirmation needed.

type.description: Entity kind. Pinning policy: contact/person/org/appointment/decision are auto-pinned.

fields.description: Entity fields. Schema is flexible per type; classifier must NOT invent missing fields (use null instead).

field_confidence.description: Per-field confidence scores 0-1. Optional but recommended for OCR-derived entities.

evidence_spans.description: Character offsets in the input that produced each extracted field. Optional but useful for debugging.
